understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle, modifying your carried piece's shape, color, and rotation using modifier tiles so that it matches the requirements of one or more goal cells, then step onto each activated goal cell to complete the level. Completing all levels wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves on a grid with walls that block movement in certain directions. Each move costs stamina; running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina. The player's piece has shape, color, and rotation attributes. Stepping on modifier tiles cycles the piece's shape (6 shapes), color (orange→blue→green→red), or rotates it 90° clockwise. Goal cells activate only when the piece's shape, color, and rotation exactly match the goal's requirements, after which stepping on the cell completes it. The game provides blocked_directions to prevent wasted moves into walls. Efficient route planning is essential to conserve stamina and lives.
